# opnsense_openvpn_static_key (Resource)

Manages an OpenVPN TLS static key on OPNsense, referenced by instances via `tls_key`.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "opnsense_openvpn_static_key" "tls_crypt" {
  mode        = "crypt"
  description = "tls-crypt key for road-warrior VPN"
  key         = file("${path.module}/tls-crypt.key")
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `key` (String, Sensitive) OpenVPN static key material (PEM-style key block). Sensitive.

### Optional

- `description` (String) Description.
- `mode` (String) Key usage mode (e.g. `crypt`, `auth`, `crypt-v2`). Defaults to `crypt`.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) UUID of the static key.
